focusPoints.label: Addressing punctuality and meeting expectations
focusPoints.reason: Notes mention they are always late. Could be time management issues, unclear priorities, or external factors — worth exploring the root cause.

focusPoints.label: Current design priorities and focus areas
focusPoints.reason: No specific signal — standard bi-weekly topic. Ensures alignment on what matters most in the current cycle.

focusPoints.label: Team dynamics and collaboration flow
focusPoints.reason: No specific signal — typical for a check-in. Understanding team interactions can reveal if lateness impacts team trust or cohesion.

focusPoints.label: Support they need from you
focusPoints.reason: No specific signal — standard check-in hygiene. Opens the door to discussing any blockers or needs that might be causing delays.

focusPoints.label: Current motivation and stress levels
focusPoints.reason: No specific signal — routine wellbeing check. If lateness is stress-related, this can help identify contributing factors.
